channel.title: Rickbonavigo on pwnlentoni
channel.description: Recent content in Rickbonavigo on pwnlentoni

item.title: LA CTF 2024 — Jason Web Token
item.description: Abusing Python’s floating point arithmetic to forge JWT-like tokens — when float(‘inf’) meets type juggling.

item.title: srdnlen 2023 — Free Real Estate
item.description: Re-entrancy attack on a Solidity smart contract — bypassing extcodesize checks and draining tokens from a fake ad service.
